channel.title: coding on Xing Lin
channel.description: Recent content in coding on Xing Lin

item.title: Lines of Code for Various Software
item.description: Just out of curiosity, I wanted to know how many lines of code for various software that I am interested in (mostly, file systems and key-value stores). ext4 is the newer version for ext2, mainly added with the journaling mechanism to provide data consistency for crashes. The number of codes for ext4 is 5 times more than ext2. f2fs is a new file system that is optimized for flash devices while nova is a new file system that is optimized for persistent memory.
